message:
fix(db): use ACTIVE_RESERVATION_PREDICATE in release_reservations query

Replace hardcoded `released_ts IS NULL` check with the shared
ACTIVE_RESERVATION_PREDICATE constant to ensure release_reservations
uses the same active-reservation logic as all other query paths. This
prevents inconsistencies if the active predicate evolves (e.g. adding
TTL expiry checks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
